sample_timepoint_structure: GEO identifies GSE100833 as a phase 2b multicenter randomized double-blind placebo-controlled ustekinumab Crohn study. GEO design states 329 Crohn biopsies from 87 anti-TNF-alpha refractory patients across multiple intestinal regions and blood samples from 204 patients at week 0 before drug treatment; full GEO matrix has 1717 samples including biopsy and blood records. Reuse literature identifies GSE100833 as CERTIFI and describes biopsy timepoints including baseline, week 6, and week 22, but GEO title fields do not expose all timepoints directly.
recommended_overlap_notes: CERTIFI phase 2b ustekinumab Crohn family row. Public GEO evidence supports anti-TNF-refractory Crohn patients in a phase 2b ustekinumab trial with intestinal biopsy and blood microarray samples. Distinct trial family from UNITI/IM-UNITI rows DS047/DS107; no public evidence of subject/sample overlap with UNITI rows. Count as an independent cohort family, but do not interpret DS102 sample count as independent subjects because it includes multiple tissues/timepoints/sample records.
